title: T-006 — oee_shift_metrics materialized view + MTBF/MTTR stubs (OEE §9.2)
prompt:
# T-006 — oee_shift_metrics materialized view

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §9.2 (`oee_shift_metrics` DDL verbatim), §11 V-OEE-AGG-2..5, D-OEE-1
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create `oee_shift_metrics` MATERIALIZED VIEW per PRD §9.2 verbatim, exposing per-shift A/P/Q/OEE averages, output/downtime/waste totals, snapshot counts, and MTBF/MTTR stub columns (NULL when `downtime_event_count=0` per V-OEE-AGG-4). The MV is refreshed by T-008 shift_aggregator_v1 rule and by ad-hoc admin trigger (no synchronous compute in request path per D-OEE-1).

## Pre-flight schema check
Read `packages/db/migrations/` for: latest migration number; `oee_snapshots` (08-PRODUCTION owner) — if absent, fail fast with a clear error citing 08-PRODUCTION as the missing dependency; `shift_configs` from T-003; `downtime_events` from 08-PRODUCTION (08-PROD §13). If `downtime_events` is not yet present, the LEFT JOIN remains in the DDL but the MV is created with `WITH NO DATA` and a clear test-time skip note; the cross-module dependency is tracked in coverage.md.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/NNNN_oee_b_shift_metrics_mv.sql` containing the §9.2 SELECT verbatim: SUM/AVG over oee_snapshots LEFT JOIN downtime_events LEFT JOIN shift_configs, grouped by (tenant→ORG_ID, site_id, line_id, shift_date AT TIME ZONE sc.timezone, shift_id, sc.shift_label).
2. `CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_oee_shift_pk ON oee_shift_metrics(org_id, site_id, line_id, shift_date, shift_id)` (required for CONCURRENTLY refresh per V-OEE-AGG-5).
3. `CREATE INDEX idx_oee_shift_date ON oee_shift_metrics(shift_date DESC)`.
4. Map PRD's `tenant_id` literal in the §9.2 DDL to `org_id` per Wave0 v4.3 lock.
5. Drizzle schema `packages/db/src/schema/oee/shift-metrics.ts` (read-only).
6. Vitest: (a) MV exists post-migration, (b) refresh with CONCURRENTLY succeeds (requires unique index), (c) MTBF/MTTR columns return NULL when `downtime_event_count=0` (V-OEE-AGG-4), (d) RLS on the underlying tables propagates (manual filter test: org A cannot see org B rows via MV after `app.set_org_context`).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_oee_b_shift_metrics_mv.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/oee/shift-metrics.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/oee-b-shift-metrics-mv.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the migration runs, when `\d+ oee_shift_metrics` is read, then it is a MATERIALIZED VIEW with the §9.2 column shape (A/P/Q/OEE averages, totals, snapshot_count, mttr_min, mtbf_min, last_snapshot_at) and `idx_oee_shift_pk` UNIQUE + `idx_oee_shift_date` indexes exist.
2. Given the unique index exists, when `REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY oee_shift_metrics` runs, then it succeeds without locking readers (V-OEE-AGG-5).
3. Given inserted oee_snapshots rows with no joined downtime_events, when the MV is refreshed and queried, then `mttr_min` and `mtbf_min` are NULL for those (line, shift, date) rows (V-OEE-AGG-4).
4. Given two orgs each with snapshots, when `app.set_org_context(token, orgA)` then `SELECT FROM oee_shift_metrics`, then only orgA rows are returned (RLS propagates from oee_snapshots).

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest oee-b-shift-metrics-mv asserting four ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test oee-b-shift-metrics-mv`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not refresh non-CONCURRENTLY in production paths — V-OEE-AGG-5.
- Do not compute synchronously in the request path — refresh is driven by T-008 rule + ad-hoc admin trigger (D-OEE-1).
- Do not write to oee_snapshots from this task — read-only consumer (08-PRODUCTION owns).
- Do not name business column tenant_id; use org_id per Wave0 v4.3.
- Do not omit the UNIQUE index — CONCURRENTLY requires it.

pipeline_inputs.description: Create oee_shift_metrics MV per §9.2 verbatim with unique index for CONCURRENTLY refresh + MTBF/MTTR NULL safety + RLS propagation tests.
pipeline_inputs.details: MV is the per-shift rollup consumed by OEE-002 heatmap (T-015) and OEE-003 summary (T-016). Refresh is driven by T-008 shift_aggregator_v1 rule firing 5 min after shift_end_time (V-OEE-AGG-1) and by an admin Server Action for backfill (out-of-scope here). MTBF/MTTR are stubs feeding 13-MAINTENANCE consumer (D-MNT-3 cross-module) and PRD §15.7 OEE-P2-B Equipment Health. The §9.2 DDL uses `tenant_id` literal — this task maps it to `org_id` per Wave0 v4.3 lock.

Given two orgs each with snapshots, when app.set_org_context(token, orgA) then SELECT FROM oee_shift_metrics, then only orgA rows are returned

Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test oee-b-shift-metrics-mv`
